title: [Hinterwilds, Boreal Forest]
description: A stand of hardy tamarack grows thick along the western edge of the trailway, their vibrant golden foliage contrasting vividly with the white of the icy landscape and the green of neighboring fir and hoarbeam.  Needles from all manner of conifers commingle in a multicolored blanket on the frozen earth.  The heavy foresting serves as a bar to the screaming winds, but not the unrelenting cold.
paths: Obvious paths: east, southeast, southwest, northwest
